texto: I've always thought that love was being foolish and stupid. It's about being on the edge and I like being on the edge. It's not divine madness like some people think, there's no such thing as divine madness, madness is just madness. Love is hallucinating without drugs.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Louis Nowra: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “I've always thought that love was being foolish and stupid. texto: It's because his wife left him. That's why he's acting funny. She left him the other night. While she was putting her bags into the taxi he was outside on the footpath begging her to stay. On his knees! Why are men so embarrassing?Bev
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Louis Nowra que provoca temas ligados a humor. Ao questionar “It's because his wife left him. That's why he's acting funny. She left him the other night. While…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, love, men, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Where were me parents? Where were Becky? I felt so alone, so lost that I could not see. By that I mean, everything round me were a blur, everything inside me were a blur of fear and shock. I heard meself crying and moaning, My oh my, my oh my . . . I still have nightmares ’bout that time. I still feel like a sharp piece ofice has stabbed me heart real deep. I was filled, filled to the brim with utter baffle and utter loneliness. p. 15
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Louis Nowra: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Where were me parents? Where were Becky? By that I…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, heartache, sadness pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: I'm thinking about the cat dying, Dulcie and her knife against my throat, Mrs Irvin and her St Thomas bone... But never my sister. A brother rarely thinks about his sister.

texto: It’s the body and eyes that tell what a person is thinking or going to do.
